scripts.vendor-css: mkdir -p resources/public/css && cp node_modules/@mantine/core/styles.css resources/public/css/mantine-core.css && cp node_modules/@mantine/notifications/styles.css resources/public/css/mantine-notifications.css
scripts.dev: npm run vendor-css && npx shadow-cljs watch app
scripts.release: npm run vendor-css && npx shadow-cljs release app
